Organization.query: SELECT TOP 1 * FROM (SELECT TOP 1 ProgramKey AS strProgramKey1 FROM ProgramModule.Program WHERE StatusDisplayName = 'Active' ORDER BY NEWID()) AS P1, (SELECT TOP 1 ProgramKey AS strProgramKey2 FROM ProgramModule.Program WHERE StatusDisplayName = 'Active' ORDER BY NEWID()) AS P2, (SELECT TOP 1 SystemRoleKey AS strSystemRoleKey1 FROM SecurityModule.SystemRole ORDER BY NEWID()) AS R1, (SELECT TOP 1 SystemRoleKey AS strSystemRoleKey2 FROM SecurityModule.SystemRole ORDER BY NEWID()) AS R2

Location.query: SELECT TOP 1 * FROM (SELECT TOP 1 OrganizationKey AS strOrganizationKey FROM OrganizationModule.Organization WHERE StatusDisplayName = 'Active' ORDER BY NEWID()) AS O1, (SELECT TOP 1 ProgramKey AS strProgramKey1 FROM ProgramModule.Program WHERE StatusDisplayName = 'Active' ORDER BY NEWID()) AS P1, (SELECT TOP 1 ProgramKey AS strProgramKey2 FROM ProgramModule.Program WHERE StatusDisplayName = 'Active' ORDER BY NEWID()) AS P2, (SELECT TOP 1 SystemRoleKey AS strSystemRoleKey1 FROM SecurityModule.SystemRole ORDER BY NEWID()) AS R1, (SELECT TOP 1 SystemRoleKey AS strSystemRoleKey2 FROM SecurityModule.SystemRole ORDER BY NEWID()) AS R2

StaffMember.query: SELECT TOP 1 * FROM (SELECT TOP 1 OrganizationKey AS strOrganizationKey FROM OrganizationModule.Organization WHERE StatusDisplayName = 'Active' ORDER BY NEWID()) AS O1, (SELECT TOP 1 LocationKey AS strLocationKey FROM OrganizationModule.Location WHERE StatusDisplayName = 'Active' ORDER BY NEWID()) AS L1

Person.query: SELECT TOP 1 * FROM (SELECT TOP 1 OrganizationKey AS strOrganizationKey FROM OrganizationModule.Organization WHERE StatusDisplayName = 'Active' ORDER BY NEWID()) AS O1, (SELECT TOP 1 LocationKey AS strLocationKey FROM OrganizationModule.Location WHERE StatusDisplayName = 'Active' ORDER BY NEWID()) AS L1, (SELECT TOP 1 StaffMemberKey AS strStaffMemberKey FROM OrganizationModule.StaffMember ORDER BY NEWID()) AS S1, (SELECT TOP 1 ProgramKey AS strProgramKey FROM ProgramModule.Program WHERE StatusDisplayName = 'Active' ORDER BY NEWID()) AS P1

Case.query: SELECT TOP 1 * FROM (SELECT TOP 1 PersonKey AS strPersonKey FROM PersonModule.Person ORDER BY NEWID()) AS P1, (SELECT TOP 1 OrganizationKey AS strOrganizationKey FROM OrganizationModule.Organization WHERE StatusDisplayName = 'Active' ORDER BY NEWID()) AS O1, (SELECT TOP 1 LocationKey AS strLocationKey FROM OrganizationModule.Location WHERE StatusDisplayName = 'Active' ORDER BY NEWID()) AS L1, (SELECT TOP 1 StaffMemberKey AS strStaffMemberKey FROM OrganizationModule.StaffMember ORDER BY NEWID()) AS S1, (SELECT TOP 1 ProgramKey AS strProgramKey FROM ProgramModule.Program WHERE StatusDisplayName = 'Active' ORDER BY NEWID()) AS PR1

Appointment.query: SELECT TOP 1 * FROM (SELECT TOP 1 PersonKey AS strPersonKey FROM PersonModule.Person ORDER BY NEWID()) AS P1, (SELECT TOP 1 CaseKey AS strCaseKey FROM CaseModule.[Case] ORDER BY NEWID()) AS C1, (SELECT TOP 1 StaffMemberKey AS strStaffMemberKey FROM OrganizationModule.StaffMember ORDER BY NEWID()) AS S1, (SELECT TOP 1 LocationKey AS strLocationKey FROM OrganizationModule.Location WHERE StatusDisplayName = 'Active' ORDER BY NEWID()) AS L1, (SELECT TOP 1 OrganizationKey AS strOrganizationKey FROM OrganizationModule.Organization WHERE StatusDisplayName = 'Active' ORDER BY NEWID()) AS O1

GeneralNote.query: SELECT TOP 1 * FROM (SELECT TOP 1 PersonKey AS strPersonKey FROM PersonModule.Person ORDER BY NEWID()) AS P1, (SELECT TOP 1 CaseKey AS strCaseKey FROM CaseModule.[Case] ORDER BY NEWID()) AS C1, (SELECT TOP 1 StaffMemberKey AS strStaffMemberKey FROM OrganizationModule.StaffMember ORDER BY NEWID()) AS S1, (SELECT TOP 1 OrganizationKey AS strOrganizationKey FROM OrganizationModule.Organization WHERE StatusDisplayName = 'Active' ORDER BY NEWID()) AS O1, (SELECT TOP 1 LocationKey AS strLocationKey FROM OrganizationModule.Location WHERE StatusDisplayName = 'Active' ORDER BY NEWID()) AS L1, (SELECT TOP 1 ProgramKey AS strProgramKey FROM ProgramModule.Program WHERE StatusDisplayName = 'Active' ORDER BY NEWID()) AS PR1

_default.query: SELECT TOP 1 * FROM (SELECT TOP 1 OrganizationKey AS strOrganizationKey FROM OrganizationModule.Organization WHERE StatusDisplayName = 'Active' ORDER BY NEWID()) AS O1, (SELECT TOP 1 LocationKey AS strLocationKey FROM OrganizationModule.Location WHERE StatusDisplayName = 'Active' ORDER BY NEWID()) AS L1, (SELECT TOP 1 StaffMemberKey AS strStaffMemberKey FROM OrganizationModule.StaffMember ORDER BY NEWID()) AS S1, (SELECT TOP 1 PersonKey AS strPersonKey FROM PersonModule.Person ORDER BY NEWID()) AS P1, (SELECT TOP 1 CaseKey AS strCaseKey FROM CaseModule.[Case] ORDER BY NEWID()) AS C1, (SELECT TOP 1 ProgramKey AS strProgramKey FROM ProgramModule.Program WHERE StatusDisplayName = 'Active' ORDER BY NEWID()) AS PR1, (SELECT TOP 1 SystemRoleKey AS strSystemRoleKey FROM SecurityModule.SystemRole ORDER BY NEWID()) AS R1
